patch.value: pm comments/notes/learnings --add HTML-escapes angle brackets in stored text

Observed 2026-05-28: passing 'pm comments pm-XXX --add "... pm create <type> ..."' stores the text with literal HTML entities <type> instead of preserving < and >. Confirmed on this session's pm-edge/pm-fl0c/pm-th6y comments. Likely a defensive escape applied at append/comment serialization; pm does not render comments as HTML so the escape is unnecessary and harms readability when agents quote shell snippets like 'pm create <type> <title>'. Investigate where the escape happens (probably in core/store/append or a sanitizer hook), and switch to either no-op or a code-fence wrap. Low priority but visible footgun.
